name: Jiangsu Hoperun Software Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Hoperun Software Co., Ltd. provides software and IT services in China, Japan, Southeast Asia, North America, and internationally. It offers software solutions in the areas of software lifecycle management, bank resource management, and big data application services. The company's financial IT system products include business hub platform, a platform that provides enterprise level operational capabilities for the banking industry; ICredit Alert Wisdom, an alert system that predicts risk; big data ODS platform; precision marketing recommendation system, a customer centric marketing model; business integration platform; channel integration platform; project asset management and control platform; and events cloud platform. It also provides intelligent trading command system; Internet distributed core; performance monitoring and analysis platform; financial organization based on big data analysis platform; retail marketing management platform; and financial IT core system solution. Jiangsu Hoperun Software Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Nanjing, China.
